review:
Awesome selection of beer, great food, nice people, great environment. Came for lunch and a beer, had the Mojo Pork Tacos and OMG they are amazing. Definitely get the sauce that comes on it. I had it on the side because it is "sour cream based" and I don't like sour cream, but the sauce is totally amazing. Also the Cuban bread is a delicious snack (to soak up the yummy beer!!)

Definitely give the Independent a try!
